mapper.select: SELECT f.POST_SN , f.FAQ_CTG_CD , f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD , f.EXPS_ORD , f.TOP_FIX_YN , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.REG_DT , c1.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_CTG_NM , c2.COM_CD_NM AS FAQ_SUB_CTG_NM FROM FAQ f JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = f.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '101' AND c1.COM_CD = f.FAQ_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '102' AND c2.COM_CD = f.FAQ_SUB_CTG_CD WHERE f.POST_SN = #{postSn}
